general.desc: 窗口标题改为河狸计划

general.cmd: import data.client.sound,random; d=data.client.sound.data; bgm_ids=[k for k in d.keys() if d.get(k) and d.get(k).get('type')==2 and ('主城' in d.get(k).get('name','') or 'lobby' in d.get(k).get('name','').lower())]; id=random.choice(bgm_ids); print(id); s.play_bgm_sound(id)

general.desc: 随机播放主城/竞速音乐
general.cmd: import data.client.sound,random; d=data.client.sound.data; bgm_ids=[k for k in d.keys() if d.get(k) and d.get(k).get('type')==2 and ('主城' in d.get(k).get('name','') or 'lobby' in d.get(k).get('name','').lower() or '竞速' in d.get(k).get('name',''))]; id=random.choice(bgm_ids); print(id); s.play_bgm_sound(id)

import data.client.sound,json; d=data.client.sound.data; r={k:dict(d.get(k)) for k in d.keys() if d.get(k) and d.get(k).get('type')==2}; f=open('E:/bgm_full.json','w'); json.dump(r,f,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2); f.close(); print('Done! '+str(len(r))+' items')

unpack.cmd:
import C_file,zstd,os; exec("total=0; success=0
for line in open('MAP文件路径','r'):
 line=line.strip()
 if not line or line.startswith('#'): continue
 total+=1
 p=line.split('\t')[0].strip().replace('\\','/')
 out=os.path.join('输出目录',p)
 try: os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(out))
 except: pass
 try:
  d=C_file.get_res_file(p,'')
  if d:
   try: open(out,'wb').write(zstd.decompress(d)); success+=1
   except: open(out,'wb').write(d); success+=1
 except: pass
print('Done! Success:',success,'/',total)")

import C_file,zstd,os,patch.ptutils as ptutils; exec("data=ptutils.load_compressed_bin_file('MAP文件路径'); content=data if isinstance(data,str) else data.decode('utf-8',errors='replace'); total=0; success=0
for line in content.split('\n'):
 line=line.strip()
 if not line: continue
 total+=1
 p=line.split('\t')[0].strip().replace('\\','/')
 if '关键词' not in p: continue
 out=os.path.join('输出目录',p)
 try: os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(out))
 except: pass
 try:
  d=C_file.get_res_file(p,'')
  if d:
   try: open(out,'wb').write(zstd.decompress(d)); success+=1
   except: open(out,'wb').write(d); success+=1
 except: pass
print('Done! Success:',success,'/',total)")

import C_file,zstd,os,patch.ptutils as ptutils; exec("data=ptutils.load_compressed_bin_file('MAP文件路径'); content=data if isinstance(data,str) else data.decode('utf-8',errors='replace'); total=0; success=0
for line in content.split('\n'):
 line=line.strip()
 if not line: continue
 total+=1
 p=line.split('\t')[0].strip().replace('\\','/')
 if not p.startswith('目录前缀'): continue
 out=os.path.join('输出目录',p)
 try: os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(out))
 except: pass
 try:
  d=C_file.get_res_file(p,'')
  if d:
   try: open(out,'wb').write(zstd.decompress(d)); success+=1
   except: open(out,'wb').write(d); success+=1
 except: pass
print('Done! Success:',success,'/',total)")
